findings.title: error_handling: 31 variants in httpx/
findings.description:
31 error_handling variants in httpx/ (4/48 use canonical pattern).
  - _auth.py:82 (Auth.sync_auth_flow)
  - _auth.py:107 (Auth.async_auth_flow)
  - _auth.py:242 (DigestAuth._parse_challenge)
findings.fix: Konsolidiere auf das dominante Pattern (4×). 44 Abweichung(en) in: _auth.py, _client.py, _decoders.py, _exceptions.py, _main.py und 39 weitere.

findings.title: Happy-path-only test suite in tests/client/
findings.description: 168 test functions with 389 positive / 34 negative assertions (negative ratio 8.0%). 8 boundary-named tests.
findings.fix: Add negative tests to tests/client/ (168 test functions, only 34 negative assertions): use pytest.raises for expected exceptions, test edge cases (empty, None, invalid input).
